name: cloud-function-framework

metadata.name: cloud-function-framework
metadata.summary: A CLI tool to bootstrap Google Cloud Functions projects.

documentation:
# Cloud Function Framework
A CLI tool to bootstrap Google Cloud Functions projects effortlessly.

functions.name: cloud_function_framework.project_setup.setup_project
documentation: Set up the project structure and generate necessary files.

functions.name: cloud_function_framework.helpers.create_project_structure
documentation: Create the simplified project structure with necessary files.

functions.name: cloud_function_framework.helpers.generate_requirements
documentation: Generate a requirements.txt file for the project.

functions.name: cloud_function_framework.helpers.generate_scripts
documentation: Generate test_local.py and deploy_to_gcp.py in the scripts directory.

functions.name: cloud_function_framework.cli.cli
documentation: CLI Tool for Google Cloud Function Setup.
